scope.target: Apply the user-requested branch-policy cleanup and require AI identity trailers on future AI-assisted commits.
constraints: Do not rewrite existing Git history.
Require accurate runtime/model identity without invented versions.
non_goals: Remove develop or agent-specific long-lived-branch exclusions.

steps: Remove obsolete baseline and release entries from Outdated Branch Models.
Add a prospective AI model signature trailer contract and examples.
Apply the new trailer to this correction commit and its merge commit.
Validate policy wording, workflow artifacts, and context gates.
execution.last_completed_step: Removed obsolete branch examples and added the required AI model signature trailer contract.
execution.next_action: Commit the correction with the new AI signature, then merge with --no-ff and the same signature contract.

results.summary: Removed two obsolete branch-model exclusions and established prospective AI identity trailers for AI-assisted commits and merges.
results.residual_risk: Git trailers identify declared AI contribution but do not cryptographically attest the runtime or model.
